Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences and Nursing. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Sc. Talking about Advanced Masters level, some of the available courses include DM. The fee structure for the Bangalore Baptist Hospital programmes is around INR 2,25,000.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration has started for admission to MBBS, BDS and other courses. The last date to register is Mar 8, 2026. Also, the NEET UG exam 2026 is going to be held on May 3, 2026.

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates must have completed 17 years at the time of admission or on or before December 31 of the admission year to apply for NEET required for MBBS programme at The White Medical College and Hospital. The upper age limit for NEET is 25 years as on the date of examination (5 year relaxation for OBC/ SC/ ST category candidates).
faqs.question: Is there any age limit to apply at The White Medical College and Hospital?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates need to pass Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology subjects from a recognised board to apply for MBBS at The White Medical College and Hospital. Indian Nationals, Non Resident Indians (NRI's), Overseas Citizen of India (OCI's), Persons of Indian Origin (PIO's) & Foreign Nationals are eligible to apply for MBBS.
faqs.question: What is the qualification required to apply at The White Medical College and Hospital?

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fees for MBBS is INR 15.8 lakh at The White Medical College and Hospital. Candidates who offered seat in the college need to pay the course fees to confirm their seat. The fees can be paid in the mode accepted by the college.

admission_process.title: The White Medical College and Hospital Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: The White Medical College and Hospital offers admission based on entrance exam scores of candidates. Those aspirants meeting eligibility can apply for MBBS programme. Check below the steps to get a seat in the college:
1. The White Medical College and Hospital Application Process 2026
Aspirants must first apply for NEET-UG. After appearing for NEET-UG, candidates need to register on the official website of Baba Farid University of Health Sciences for counselling.
2. Entrance Exam & Cutoff
Aspirants must appear for NEET for admission to MBBS. Candidates must score equal or aboveThe White Medical College and Hospital cutoff to get a seat.
3. Counselling and Seat Allotment

Aspirants must apply for Baba Farid University of Health Sciences counselling conducted by the Punjab Government. Candidates need to provide course and college preference during counselling. The university allots seats to candidates based on their NEET rank. Selected aspirants have to report at the campus for document verification. Candidates also need to pay theThe White Medical College and Hospital feesto confirm their seat.

The total tuition fees for MBBS at The White Medical College and Hospital isINR 15.8 lakh. Candidates who are allotted seat in the college need to pay the course fees for seat confirmation. There are150 seatsin MBBS in every academic session.

college_info.intro:
Maharaja Agrasen University offers UG and PG courses through 5 schools of study, including Management, Institute of Technology, Pharmacy, Law, and Applied Sciences. MBA and BTech are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
Maharaja Agrasen University Baddi offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of CSE, Electrical & Electronics, Mechanical, Civil, Electronics & Communication, and others. faqs.answer: Maharaja Agrasen University for admission is located in Solan, Himachal Pradesh. It was established in 2008. It is a member of AIU and is recognized by AICTE, BCI, and COA. The university offers 250+ courses. Maharaja Agrasen University accepts scores from various entrance exams depending on the program. Commonly accepted exams include JEE Main, NEET, HPCET, GATE, CMAT, CAT, MAT-AIMA, UGC-NET (including JRF), UGC-CSIR, SLET, GATE, and GPAT.
faqs.question: Q: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by Maharaja Agrasen University for admission?

faqs.answer: No, you cannot join Maharaja Agrasen University directly. Admission to this University are entrance based.You should qualify any of the exams like CAT/CMAT/MAT/HPCET/XAT/GMAT/ATMA to make yourself eligible for selection for MBA programmes offered by the university. Then the shortlisted candidates are required to appear for Group discussion and Personal interview round where they are further screened for final selection.You can apply for B.Tech at Maharaja Agrasen University through Jee Mains and HPCET.

admission_overview.college_name: Maharaja Agrasen University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Process, Date

paragraphs: Maharaja Agrasen Universityadmission 2025is conducted online. Candidates seeking admission to any of the programmes offered by the University must satisfy the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective programmes. Eligible students need to register themselves online for admission through the official website of the University. 25% seats are filled by the bona fide candidates of Himachal Pradesh, while the remaining 75% seats are filled by the candidates of India. It offers more than 250coursesat UG, PG, diploma, PG diploma, certificate and doctoral level across multiple fields such as Applied Sciences, Law, Business & Management Studies, Commerce, Engineering and Pharmacy.

For Maharaja Agrasen University admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Maharaja Agrasen University course admissions 2025:

Maharaja Agrasen University admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process around KUD admissions 2025:
Step 1: Maharaja Agrasen University Application Process 2025

Maharaja Agrasen University admission process 2025 starts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at MAU. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the PG courses at Maharaja Agrasen University is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams such as CAT, MAT or merit for the selection of respective courses. Furthermore, the university offers UG courses through its affiliated colleges. Admissions to UG courses are based on merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seat.
For more information check out the below video:

faqs.answer: A candidate must have passed Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category candidates) to be eligible for the B.Tech programme offered by Maharaja Agrasen University, and for Lateral Entry, the candidate must have passed a Diploma in a relevant stream with a minimum of 50% marks (45% for reserved category candidates) in aggregate.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Maharaja Agrasen University?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot join Maharaja Agrasen University directly. Admission to this University are entrance based.You should qualify any of the exams like CAT/CMAT/MAT/HPCET/XAT/GMAT/ATMA to make yourself eligible for selection for MBA programmes offered by the university. Then the shortlisted candidates are  required to appear for Group discussion and Personal interview round where they are further screened for final selection.You can apply for B.Tech at Maharaja Agrasen University through Jee Mains and HPCET.

faqs.question: Can I get into Maharaja Agrasen University with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: The admission process with 12th percentage differs from branch to branch. Whether it is BA in business, BA in english and other major branches the minium precent an aspring candidate would need is 45%.If you want to do Bachelor of Technology or B.Tech the eliblity criteria would be 50% marks in class 12th with physics and maths as mandatory subjects and the 3rd subject is optional.You can refer to the official website and validate or know details.

placement_data.title: Maharaja Agrasen University Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: As per NIRF report 2025, 208 students got placements during Maharaja Agrasen University placements 2024. From UG 3-year course, 15 students were placed and median salary was INR 3.15 LPA. 45 students were placed from the UG 4-year courses. M edian package in UG 4-year was 5.10 LPA. In UG 5-year course, 6 students were placed with the median salary of 4.80 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: Things are under my knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is big and looks sophisticated, with many facilities like free Wi-Fi. Every classroom has air conditioning. Each department has its separate library. There is a gym for students, as well as a sports club, with rooms available for table tennis, badminton, cricket, etc. The quality of the mess food is quite impressive and tasty. The canteen contains all items, from milk prices, etc. Medical facilities are provided in the pharmacy block

reviews.review_heading: Maharaja Agrasen review by a student.
reviews.review_text: Provided with well-maintained library with Wi-Fi giving students the facility for detailed learning, labs are well furnished and equipped, though chemical are sometimes shortened by staff. Well-maintained classrooms with Wi-Fi are good as well for students and smart boards for good explanation .

reviews.review_heading: Best University in Solan.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi, and labs in every department, and classrooms are well-maintained with hygiene. Every class has smart rooms, and every department has a separate library, along with a central library. Hostel and transportation facilities are also available. The mess and canteens are well-maintained, and medical facilities are available 24/7. Sports like indoor and outdoor are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am studying B.Com LL.B in this university, & I am fully satisfied with the university environment.
reviews.review_text: We have all the necessary facilities in our university and the infrastructure is outstanding compared to other universities. Many facilities are provided in the classrooms and library and we also have wifi available. The food in the mess and canteen is amazing.

reviews.review_heading: The university is very good and the facilities are very good. I love my university .
reviews.review_text:
All classes have a ACs and each room has its own projector. 
The classrooms are very clean. The classes also have four or five fans. The lab also has all the necessary things, like computers and a projector, which are used by students to do their practical work.

reviews.review_heading: It's a great university for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course students and their hostel facilities are good. They have their personal Wi-Fi password for daily work and usage, and they also have library book benefits. In the hostel, the food quality is good, and the hostel facilities are also good on the college campus. Medical facilities, in any type of injury and in bad condition, also treat the students in detail. Our college also has a basketball, football, volleyball and cricket ground for their tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: Review for the college Maharaja Agrasen University.
reviews.review_text: In the department, there are classes with AC, and there's a library. There are proper labs separately for every subject with projectors. We do practicals daily as per time tables and make practical notebooks. Assignments are given from time to time. I am happy with college.

reviews.review_heading: Nice environment with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: u25cfThe classes are well furnished including smart rooms, AC facility. Labs also have proper infrastructure. Library has almost all kinds of books. There is even the facility of online library. The campus is full of greenery. You can enjoy the natural environment here. u25cfHere the hostels have three types of rooms - 1,  2 and 3 seater and the feels is also affordable as compare to other colleges. The mess food is okay-okay. Th medical facility is good here. For sports and games, there are cou...

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good infrastructure. The hostel is clean and huge. The food served in the mess is good in taste. It provides different meals with a healthy diet. All classrooms and labs are air-conditioned. All classrooms are huge.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, good facilities for libraries, and qualified teachers.
reviews.review_text:
Good Wi-Fi facilities are available in all departments.
All types of sports equipment are available in the sports room.
The quality of food is best available in the mess and canteen. Good medical facilities are available in the university, and they organise medical camps like blood donation camps.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our course is based on computers. Classrooms are well-maintained. Hostel rooms are decent at affordable prices. Our campus has good environment.

reviews.review_heading: Living my best life in this college .
reviews.review_text: In our college there are various facilities like library, multiple labs, play grounds and most important for me is gym. The product quality in college is very good . Everything is fine all computers in all the labs are working well. Food is also good but sometimes some dishes are not well prepared .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of highly qualified professors and good placement record from past 5 years.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available all over the campus. There is a Nescafe on our campus. Almost all the crowd of college can be seen during recess time. The hostel has a good infrastructure with well-furnished rooms. Labs are well maintained with more than 100 labs in our university. All the instruments are available in the labs, and we do a different type of experiments.

reviews.review_heading: Partially satisfied because the experience was good but bad too because of less exposure to in.

college_info.intro:
Krishna University has more than 15 departments, including Chemistry, Computer Science, English, Pharmacy, Computer Science, Commerce & Business Management, Mathematics, and others. The affiliated colleges and departments of the university offer a wide range of courses at the UG and PG programmes across various streams. MBA and BTech are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
KRU University offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Computer Science, Electronics & Electrical, Communication Engineering, and others. Below mentioned are Krishna University’s popular programmes:

faqs.answer: A:    As per the basic eligibility criteria released by the Krishna University, there is no percentage criteria based on 10 or 10+2 grade. However, it is mandatory for the candidates to do complete their UG degree with a passing percentage of 50% in any discipline from the UGC recognised university. For more detailed-wise eligibility criteria, candidates need to check out below:As per the APICET eligibility criteria 2025 candidates seeking admission to the MBA programme should have studied and passed the three- or four-year degree course in any discipline conducted by the university or recognised by University Grants Commission (UGC).Candidates with aggregate marks of 50% (45% in the case of reserved categories – SC, ST and BC) are alone eligible to take admission through APICET. The qualifying Degree obtained by the Distance Mode Program should be recognised by the Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE, and DEC/DEB. The candidates who are appearing for the final year degree examination shall also be eligible to appear for Andhra Pradesh ICET-2025.
faqs.question: Can I get into Krishna University if I have scored just 50% in 10th and 60% in 12th?

Similarly, for the OBC quota, the Andhra Pradesh EAMCET cutoff stood between 99950 and 116772. Moreover, BTech in CSE was the most competitive course for all the quotas. review_summary.college_name: Krishna University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Process Management - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Not absolutely, but I'm satisfied with our college. The best is the placement rate.

content.Placements: The Tata company is the best recruiter for this course. For this course, the placements at Tata are compulsory as it is the course offered by the Tata company. So I wish I had chosen the right course if placements are the main target. Some more companies also hire the students.
content.Infrastructure: We have a tally lab, seminar hall, webinar hall for collaborations, etc. Almost all the meetings will be held there. The ambience is good. The college is full of greenery and is nature-friendly. This is the best place and an eco-friendly college. I'm perfectly comfortable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty and the facilities, like hostels, buses, and more.

content.Placements: I think 3 members were placed last year. They just do NCC and NSS. I like those in that university. Everything is a waste of time, just to pass the time, going to college. They didn't even tell us the package of our seniors. They just wasted our time and more.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel, no bus facility, and the faculty were just playing games without teaching classes. In the last year, our teacher did not even complete half of our syllabus. The semester has come. 3 chapters we lost, and we failed. They come to college but don't teach.

Bakery, and Pearlosus,these companies are present in Vijayawada. I know that food technology is making an impact in the industry and is currently gaining traction in society.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities were available in my college. The hostel facilities were very good, and the food was cooked very well. The cleaning process was amazing. They cleaned the college, rooms, and classrooms every day. Discipline was the main thing in our college, and everyone followed a well-mannered uniform. It was an exciting experience every day.

individual_reviews.title: Highly knowledgeable faculty, good placements, and infrastructure facilities were excellent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc (Honours) in Data Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Worthy of study and money as well.

content.Placements: Atleast the student must have 60% or above to be placed in a course. The highest package is 8 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and average is 5 LPA offered in the course. The top recruiting companies for all courses are TCS Essential, etc. The percentage who have at least 50%, and the projects that are done get internships from companies. Roles offered are data scientist engineer and data analytics.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are decent. The rooms are basic but functional, and the common areas are kept relatively clean. However, maintenance requests can sometimes take a while to be addressed. The food in the mess and canteen is okay, it's generally edible, but the variety could be better. Medical facilities on campus are sufficient for minor ailments, but for more serious issues, we are often referred to a nearby hospital. Sports facilities are a strong point, with well-maintained courts for basketball and tennis, and a good-size field for cricket and football.

faqs.question: Does Krishna University refund fees?
faqs.answer: The "SHREE KRISHNA UNIVERSITY " supports the students . However, if there is a clear error in the amount of payment or payee, please contact our office within 30 days in the hours of 10 am and 5pm indian Standard Time to resolve the issue. Shri Krishna University is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and approved by the government of Madhya Pradesh. The University offers several full-time degree courses and is accredited by the AICTE. Krishna University (KrU) is a state university located in Rudravaram, Machilipatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India. The university was established in 2008 by the Government of Andhra Pradesh

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at Krishna University?
faqs.answer: The fee for MBA at Krishna University is INR 20,000 (total fees) for 2 years. Krishna University offers a very diverse range of undergraduate and postgraduate programs, and the fees for MBA typically fall between INR 40,000 to INR 1,20,000. In addition you can contact the college directly for further information. If possible you can also contact any of the current students if you want to learn more

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sri Durga Malleswara Siddhartha Mahila KalasalaReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Not absolutely, but I'm satisfied with our college. The best is the placement rate.
reviews.review_text: We have a tally lab, seminar hall, webinar hall for collaborations, etc. Almost all the meetings will be held there. The ambience is good. The college is full of greenery and is nature-friendly. This is the best place and an eco-friendly college. I'm perfectly comfortable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Krishna University College Of Engineering & TechnologyReviewed on 15 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty and the facilities, like hostels, buses, and more.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel, no bus facility, and the faculty were just playing games without teaching classes. In the last year, our teacher did not even complete half of our syllabus. The semester has come. 3 chapters we lost, and we failed. They come to college but don't teach.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Andhra Loyola College (ALC, Vijayawada)
reviews.review_heading: Andhra Loyola College is a well-regarded college for students.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available in my college. The hostel facilities were very good, and the food was cooked very well. The cleaning process was amazing. They cleaned the college, rooms, and classrooms every day. Discipline was the main thing in our college, and everyone followed a well-mannered uniform. It was an exciting experience every day.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sri Durga Malleswara Siddhartha Mahila KalasalaReviewed on 15 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Highly knowledgeable faculty, good placements, and infrastructure facilities were excellent.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good. We have labs, and they were air-conditioned. In labs, we have projectors, which help us to learn in detail about specific things. When it comes to hostel facilities, the food tastes moderate. We have a wide variety of sports and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Nalanda Degree CollegeReviewed on 4 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Worthy of study and money as well.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are decent. The rooms are basic but functional, and the common areas are kept relatively clean. However, maintenance requests can sometimes take a while to be addressed. The food in the mess and canteen is okay, it's generally edible, but the variety could be better. Medical facilities on campus are sufficient for minor ailments, but for more serious issues, we are often referred to a nearby hospital. Sports facilities are a strong point, with well-maintained courts for basketb...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Balasai Degree CollegeReviewed on 12 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is very good in terms of infrastructure, faculty, and subject-wise teaching.
reviews.review_text: Almost 85% of the CRT students are placed in top MNC companies. As we are degree students, our package would be somewhat smaller, but it will be better. The lowest package offered starts from 2.5 LPA, and the highest package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Deloitte, Hexaware, Tech Mahindra, Global Logic, Sutherland, Capgemini, etc. 70% of students get internships in good companies. It is a degree college. We all know that normal degree students don't ge...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Smt. Velagapudi Durgamba Siddhartha Law CollegeReviewed on 22 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: There are no placements. I suggest students for internships. The overall environment is good.
reviews.review_text: There is no separate hostel in our college. It emerges our hostel with V. R. Siddhartha Engineering College students. The hostel will fill with them for LL.B. students. Hostelers didn't have all facilities. Outside the PG hostel food is not at all good. It's the college's responsibility to accommodate students in their college hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by K.V.R. Government College for Women (Autonomous)
reviews.review_heading: Good college according to the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, library, and all were good. Lecturers take special care. Hostel had 24X7 security. Canteen was also present. It also had play ground. The best thing about this college was NCC. The college had a special auditorium for the day scholars and a separate auditorium for the hostelers. It also gives us a traditional vibe. As it was the assembly once it was a too old college with a route map. It also provided M.Sc. courses. The individual classroom and labs were set in a peaceful natur...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Gowtham Degree CollegeReviewed on 30 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good for studies and has good staff.
reviews.review_text: The college provides excellent facilities. The teaching quality is commendable and the hostel facilities are satisfactory. The food served in the mess and canteen is good and there are sufficient medical facilities available. The college also encourages sports and games promoting overall development beyond academics.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Krishna University College Of Engineering & TechnologyReviewed on 15 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Computer science students can learn a lot of things at college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good at the college. The hostel has one of the best accommodation facilities for both boys and girls. The hostel is located in a pollution-free environment with greenery all around. Boy's hostel can accommodate 500 students whereas 200 students are granted admission to the girls' hostel. The college is surrounded by greenery and trees everywhere.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Andhra Loyola College (ALC, Vijayawada)
reviews.review_heading: It is one of the biggest colleges in Vijayawada.
reviews.review_text: The college is one of the largest in Vijayawada, offering numerous facilities. Wi-Fi and well-equipped labs are available, and the hostel is excellent, featuring all necessary amenities. The food provided is also outstanding and offers great value for money. Medical facilities, including a hospital, are located on campus, and various sports and NCC activities are organized at the state level.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Nalanda Degree CollegeReviewed on 11 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good teaching facility with a peaceful environment.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good but no AC available but there is ventilation can get free air with the peaceful ground. Students have physical activities in the college. Healthy washrooms every day clean and neat no ragging issues in the college and respectful teachers.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by K.V.S.R. Siddhartha College Of Pharmaceutical SciencesReviewed on 16 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our college faculty behavior is good.
reviews.review_text: My college building is colorful. My college has 4 floors each floor is clean and neat. The college management provides each floor washrooms for girls and boys and providing cool and normal water. During rest time, a canteen is available. The hostel is very good. They maintain timings and provide quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Andhra Loyola College (ALC, Vijayawada)
reviews.review_heading: Our faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classes are separate, and all lab materials are provided by our college management. The hostels are very clean and are cleaned every day. The quality of food is high, and hygiene is maintained. There are mess facilities and a canteen available, along with medical services. Sports and games are regularly organized. Additionally, study hours are conducted in the hostels, and various hostel festivals are held.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Andhra Loyola College (ALC, Vijayawada)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is recruiting new staff members.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are separate. All lab materials are provided by our college management. Hostels are very clean and workers clean every day. The food served is of quality and hygienic. Mess and canteen are there. Medical facilities are provided. Sports and games are conducted. In hostels, they conduct study hours and also conduct a hostel fest.

college_info.college_name: Medical College and Hospital, Bharati Vidyapeeth: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Medical College and Hospital, Bharati Vidyapeeth:

faqs.answer: A:    Medical College and Hospital, Bharati Vidyapeeth offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 9.30816 LPA to Master of Surgery students.
faqs.question: How much in-campus salary is offered at Medical College and Hospital, Bharati Vidyapeeth to Master of Surgery students?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as MBBS. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MD, MS and Master of Surgery. The fee structure for the Medical College and Hospital, Bharati Vidyapeeth programmes is around INR 22,50,000 to 1,33,70,550.

review_content.Placements: Mostly all the students get placed and they earn a good amount of money. We mostly do our internships in college itself because our college has a good flow of patients which helps us to see a wide variety of patients. The average salary package offered for a medical undergraduate is Rs. 40,000 per month and it can vary up to 1 lac per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a very good infrastructure. It has all the advanced machines which provide up-to-date learning. We got good labs will all the needed resources. Classrooms are good, but there is no air-conditioning. Food quality in the mess is not up to the standard. But the canteen has good food.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It has good infrastructure and is focused on academics, but no campus life or curricular activities.

review_content.Placements: Bharati Vidyapeeth Medical college, being a medical college, does not have on-campus placements, but the degree is recognised worldwide. Passing out from here opens up various job opportunities throughout the country. Packages start from 20,000-70,000 per month, depending upon the hospital you work at.
review_content.Infrastructure: The building is fairly new and well built. All the labs are well-equipped. There is a separate building for the library, which is well lit and spacious. The hospital is well constructed and well maintained. It is clean and hygienic. Bharati maintains the campus well with beautiful lawns and fountains. There are separate hostels for girls and boys with single and double occupancy rooms with attached washrooms and bathrooms. AC is not available, but the weather doesn't require it. Food is as good as a mess can offer. A gym is also available in the hostel, along with table tennis tables. There is a huge ground (not well maintained) for cricket and football.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure, and it charges high fees.

review_content.Placements: Students in our college have to complete an internship in the hospital. Students don't get any stipend to do an internship, and they have to do duty 365 days compulsorily. They don't get paid well. A common MBBS student gets a salary up to Rs. 85,000 per month in any government hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is beautiful, with a pleasant vibe all around. The hostels are huge and spacious. Single and double accommodation is given based on the choice of the students. Mess food is not up to the mark. The canteen is good and clean. Classrooms are good here, but there is no air-conditioning facility. Wi-Fi facilities are limited, and students get only 34 MB each day.

faqs.answer: Medical College and Hospital, Bharati Vidyapeeth is a good institution for MD, MS, Master of Surgery, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Medical College and Hospital, Bharati Vidyapeeth are General Surgery, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Pediatrics, Radiology, ENT, Orthopaedics, Ophthalmology, Psychiatry, Pharmacology, Pathology, General Medicine, Dermatology, Anesthesiology, Community Medicine, Biochemistry, Physiology, Anatomy, Microbiology.
faqs.question: Q: Are there any specializations offered by Medical College and Hospital, Bharati Vidyapeeth?

faqs.answer: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure and great teachers.

review_content.Placements: MBBS doesn't have a placement scheme in any college, but many of our seniors have been accepted into good PG institutes. There have been 11 batches of students as of 2022. The graduates can do PG at institutes, become medical officers, do a non-PG junior residency, or open their own private practice after this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent, with air-conditioned lecture halls. There is a library that is open from 9 AM to 5 PM and a reading room that is open from 8 AM to 10 PM. There are museums containing specimens in every department. The hostel is average but affordable at a fee of Rs. 6,000 per year. There are three canteens. One serves snacks while the other two serve meals. There are also numerous tiffin providers in the area. There is a football field, a basketball court, two badminton courts, and a table tennis table.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with its facilities and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: There are 200 students in our batch, and they are all doing MBBS and they are my colleagues. Students help each other in studies. After passing post graduate examination of NEET PG students can get into next course which helps patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very huge and every department is well-equipped with proper light and air. Environment is also very good, and lecture halls have air-conditioning. The environment is very suitable and helps concentrate students to study. The classrooms are clean.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Found it good with anything and everything you may require for your MBBS.

content.Placements: We are medical students, so there are no placements, but in the end, we have to do an internship at our civil hospital, Valsad, on our campus. We have an internship at the end of 4.5 years for 1 year, and also a bond of 1 year for students who have taken a scholarship. The stipend for the internship is Rs. 25,000 per month, and for a 1-year bond, it's Rs. 90,000 something per month for a year. So it's good.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, we have a decent college, a great lecture hall, good labs, a great library, a reading room for studies, a basketball court, a badminton court, a football ground, and others. The library is open from 8:00 PM to 6:00 PM, but the reading room for study is available till 10:00 PM.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, good course, and one of the best campuses. Really good education.

content.Placements: In our college, there are 200 students in every batch. Currently, there are 6 batches in the college. One batch is the internship batch, and they are doing internships in our college hospital. They will now be going for their entrance exam for PG, and some of them will go for jobs. They will get a minimum salary of around 10-12 Lacs per year.
content.Infrastructure: The college facilities are good. The lecture halls are air-conditioned. The practical labs are well-ventilated and well-maintained. There are 2 canteens on our college campus for lunch and dinner and one central canteen for breakfast and other snacks. The hostel rooms are good, well-maintained, and the hostel feel is also good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good infrastructure and great teachers.

content.Placements: MBBS doesn't have a placement scheme in any college, but many of our seniors have been accepted into good PG institutes. There have been 11 batches of students as of 2022. The graduates can do PG at institutes, become medical officers, do a non-PG junior residency, or open their own private practice after this course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is excellent, with air-conditioned lecture halls. There is a library that is open from 9 AM to 5 PM and a reading room that is open from 8 AM to 10 PM. There are museums containing specimens in every department. The hostel is average but affordable at a fee of Rs. 6,000 per year. There are three canteens. individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with its facilities and faculty members.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very huge and every department is well-equipped with proper light and air. Environment is also very good, and lecture halls have air-conditioning. The environment is very suitable and helps concentrate students to study. The classrooms are clean.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good because faculty and teachers are good with helpful seniors.

content.Placements: About 100% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered for our course is 8.25 LPA and the lowest salary package offered for our course is 3 LPA. Both are for 5.5 years. About 95% of students got internships in our course. Dean is the top role offered in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel is good in our college. It has one bed, one table, and a personal cupboard provided to us. The infrastructure for our course is also good. The classroom, lab, library, and reading room are also available. Air-conditioner is provided in the reading room and classroom. Food quality is also good in our mess and canteen.

One serves snacks while the other two serve meals. There are also numerous tiffin providers in the area. There is a football field, a basketball court, two badminton courts, ...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its facilities and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very huge and every department is well-equipped with proper light and air. Environment is also very good, and lecture halls have air-conditioning. The environment is very suitable and helps concentrate students to study. The classrooms are clean.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good because faculty and teachers are good with helpful seniors.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is good in our college. It has one bed, one table, and a personal cupboard provided to us. The infrastructure for our course is also good. The classroom, lab, library, and reading room are also available. Air-conditioner is provided in the reading room and classroom. Food quality is also good in our mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty members in teaching and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good but facing difficulty in using bathrooms and latrines as they are for general use. We also face difficulty with water in summer. RO water isn't available in the girls' hostel. We face difficulty with food as the taste is different. Sports equipment is available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and excellent environment.
reviews.review_text:
The laboratories are very good.
Classrooms are highly functional and have the best infrastructure.
The library is huge and has a 24-hour open reading room.
The hostel is nice and clean.
Food is also good.
All outdoor sports courts are there on campus and indoor games are in college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: As for hostel fees, the quality of the hostel room is quite good. The infrastructure of the college is very good. Classrooms are very clean and have enough space. For food, canteen is provided and tiffins are also available. For sports, we have a basketball ground, volleyball ground, and a yoga room.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers, and the campus is huge.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious. An auditorium is available. The quality of the food is good. Purified drinking water is provided. Medical facilities were available. Projectors are available in classrooms. The college has a museum and a dissection hall. There are many labs, such as the biochemistry lab, the hematology lab, the PSM, and the anatomy department.

reviews.review_heading: My best college in our country.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are well developed. Food facilities are good, and canteens and medical stores are available. Sports and games are extremely popular. It is a very well-developed college in our state of Gujarat. It is good for cultural activities. So it is the best.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

reviews_list.review_title: Brief review of Career Point University Hamirpur.

review_content.Placements: I think, in my view, every year 10% of students of my course are placed because we all know companies do not only see degrees; skills are also required, so the percentage is less. The highest package offered is 9.6 Lacs per annum, and the lowest package offered is 2.6 Lacs per annum. The average package offered is 5 Lacs per annum. These packages may be accurate and are not verified. I don't know much about placements because I am a new student.
review_content.Infrastructure: The major infrastructure is good; I must say it is the best. But the Wi-Fi is not fast enough; most of the time, it is not connectable, although there are Wi-Fi facilities on every floor. The quality of food in the canteens is very healthy and hygienic. Games like badminton, football, basketball, and cricket are available. Also, there is an e-sports facility for BGMI and Free Fire tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The placement in this university is not good, but with hard work, you can get a job.

content.Placements: The placement is not that good, but if you study hard, you get a better chance to secure a placement. The highest package offered by this university was 65 LPA in 2018. There are no good campus placements, so you need to attend exams to gain high-level skills in your field.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not that satisfying. There are many courses in this university, such as B.Tech in CSE, B.Tech in Civil Engineering, BSE, M.Sc. Pharmacy, LL.B., and BCA. There are three canteens and one cafe. The campus has two blocks, with Block A being the main block, which houses the main department.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College location is in a peaceful area. College is located away from the crowded city area.

content.Placements: College placements are average, not good. Very limited companies are visited on campus for placements. The highest package is offered here around 35 LPA. In second year internships are mandatory and placement ratio is average here. Not everyone get job here but who maintain their CGPA and have a skill got better placements.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good. All labs like CS lab, chemistry lab, and physics lab are well-maintained. College building is about 9 floors but there are no lift you have to use stairs to go up and down. Boys and girls hostels are available. Hostel food is below average it is just eatable.

admission_overview.college_name: Career Point University, Hamirpur Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Career Point University, Hamirpur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs:
Career Point University, Hamirpur course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theCareer Point University, Hamirpurapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG and After 10th programmes in fields of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science and Beauty and Fitness, and more. To know about the eligibility of Career Point University, Hamirpur courses, students can visit the website.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

reviews.review_heading: The placement in this university is not good, but with hard work, you can get a job.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that satisfying. There are many courses in this university, such as B.Tech in CSE, B.Tech in Civil Engineering, BSE, M.Sc. Pharmacy, LL.B., and BCA. There are three canteens and one cafe. The campus has two blocks, with Block A being the main block, which houses the main department.

reviews.review_heading: College location is in a peaceful area. College is located away from the crowded city area.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. All labs like CS lab, chemistry lab, and physics lab are well-maintained. College building is about 9 floors but there are no lift you have to use stairs to go up and down. Boys and girls hostels are available. Hostel food is below average it is just eatable.

reviews.review_heading: Brief review of Career Point University Hamirpur.
reviews.review_text: The major infrastructure is good; I must say it is the best. But the Wi-Fi is not fast enough; most of the time, it is not connectable, although there are Wi-Fi facilities on every floor. The quality of food in the canteens is very healthy and hygienic. Games like badminton, football, basketball, and cricket are available. Also, there is an e-sports facility for BGMI and Free Fire tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: University is good but placement is not good the placement cell need to mote active.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi, lab, and library were all quite good. The food quality in the hostel mess and canteen was also quite good. There is a big ground available for every sport, and indoor games are also available. The medical facilities are not so good, but there are different clubs available, like sports, music, writing, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Career point university review.
reviews.review_text: The structure of university is good. The university ISC like structure and there is one hostel the campus and another is outside the campus. The inside hostel is for boys and another is for. The food of our hostel is good as per I know and tests.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers don't behave properly.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good but. This university in backward area so shops don't available some time student suffer for basic needs. Wi-Fi dontworjs properly. Sometimes in labs chemicals which is needed has not available. Equipments dontsworks properly. But. They tried.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is eco-friendly.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good here. The campus is eco-friendly. Best food of north India is available in the mess. Medical facility for all students in the pharmacy section is available. Volley ball, cricket and basketball are the main games here, but badminton tournament is organised for university students. People here are very friendly.

reviews.review_heading: In this course placement is weak. Rarely 2 or 3 company are visited.
reviews.review_text: Classroom, labs are above average but Wi-Fi and library is below average. Lack of books in library. Wi-Fi rarely connected. If connected speed is very poor. Hostel is good two or three students in one room mess and canteen is okay. Little gym is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of infrastructure and canteen experience. Teacher are great.
reviews.review_text: Classroom are very bad from the level thet charge the fee It feel like sitting in the school class not in university. There is no Wi-Fi in campus. Campus have ground of basketball and cricket but they are not good. Library was okay, not having some book.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. The hostel facilities are good. The food served in the mess and canteen is good. They provide medical, sports, and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Very good and supportive faculty. The campus area is not very huge, but it's enough.
reviews.review_text:
All the faculty are very supportive, and students are able to do meetings in the Pragati room for moral development.
WiFi is provided in every room and on every floor.
There are two huge labs.
12–13 classrooms are allotted for CSE.
There is a huge library for students, and mostly all types of books are available.

reviews.review_heading: My college experience and how I completed 4 years of my life here.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. It has a clean and peaceful location away from the noise and crowds of the city. Wifi is present inside blocks in universities, not in cafes and other places. Just be quick in connecting to WiFi, as many students remain active users. Labs are under regular upgrade. Classrooms are big and airy. Few classrooms have projector facilities. The library is also good; it has books for all courses and extra books for knowledge purposes.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good university, and I suggest you to must take admission here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our college include Wi-Fi facilities, which work very good, etc. If we run different types of software like C++, Java, Dev-C++, we have to upload the file with the help of internet facility. Classrooms are very good with projector screen and smart classes facilities. The quality of the facilities provided in our hostel is good, and quality food is available in the mess. There are also good sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Career Point University, Hamirpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that top class but it is good in the hostel. It provides one bed, one table, one chair, one fan, and one almira for each student. In a single room, only two students stay, and 2 Wi-Fi connections are provided by the university for a hostel. The speed is not that good.

college_info.intro:
As one of the premier Business institutes in southern India, SRM School of Management offers a wide variety of courses available in different specializations. These are the flagship courses like Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) and Master of Business Administration (MBA). The BBA and MBA courses lay a solid educational foundation for students aspiring for a career in Management. review_summary.college_name: SRM School of Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Lovely days at my college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is very vague, as a lot of students opt out of placements because of their CGPA, and they are not considered for placement. If you are an average student, you can get around 6 to 7 LPA if you maintain your CGPA. Companies like Wipro and L&T are the top recruiters. For internships, you have to secure them yourself, as the college gives almost zero support.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are actually pretty good if you opt for CSE, as the new building TP 2 is highly advanced. The library is also pretty good, with a nighttime study facility. Hostels are expensive, and the hostel staff is pretty annoying. You have an appointment at 9 o’clock, so beware of that.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college to study in, and we can choose it without any confusion.

content.Placements: The placement rate is about 70% or above. Students are placed mainly in fields such as digital marketing and IT. Eligibility for placements is generally 75% or above with no arrears.
content.Infrastructure: The college has very good infrastructure. It includes classrooms, labs, and a library. Hostel is very clean. Food provided is good for consumption. The college is very supportive of sports. They gives extra care to sports activities..
content.Faculty: Teachers are very good at teaching and help students score good marks. The pass percentage requirement is above 35%. As a student at SRM, teachers help prepare students for the industry, as they are highly qualified and knowledgeable. Teachers also train students for campus placements and examinations. Teachers teach every topic clearly, which helps students score well in semester examinations. They also regularly train students for internships.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good with many facilities: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Everything is organized in a well-structured manner. There are extracurricular activities, and medical emergency facilities are also available. The campus has a sports arena as well.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college life in a nutshell :).

content.Placements: Since we are the first batch, I do not know much about it, but the average package starts at 5–6 LPA for a BBA general. If you perform pretty well academically and have the skills needed, you can earn more. Around 90% of students always get placed.
content.Infrastructure: There's Wi-Fi always, the labs are well-equipped too, and the and the classrooms are okayish. I live in a PG, but according to my friend, the food in the hostel is the best, they have a wide range of varieties every day, and there's a huge scope for sports since they conduct many events.

admission_process.title: SRM School of Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: To get admission to SRM School of Management students have to follow various steps, like  filling out the application form, qualifying for the selection rounds and final seat confirmation. Refer to the pointers below to know the SRM School of Management admission 2025 process-
1- SRM School of Management Application Process 2025

Candidates seeking admission to the MBA are required to fill out the TANCET application form for admission. Additionally, after filling out all the criteria set by the college, candidates are required to visit the official website of the college to fill out the registration form.
2- SRM School of Management Selection Round

SRM School of Management admission is based on the entrance exam for the MBA programme, whereas BBA admission is merit-based. The college selects candidates for MBA based on TNCET exam scores. Additionally, college also accepts CET/MAT/CAT, and other entrance tests. To clear the selection round and get to the counselling round for final seat allotment, students have first clear the GD and the personal interview round.
3- Final seat Confirmation
After candidates get selected, they must complete their enrollment by submitting the requiredSRM School of Management feewithin the given deadline to secure admission.

faqs.question: How long is the MBA programme at SRM School of Management?

faqs.question: What if I can't get into SRM School of Management for MBA?
faqs.answer: If admission to SRM School of Management for MBA is not possible, you may try to apply next year or check other institutions that accept similar tests.Because SRMIST has several campuses, you can see if there are any MBA seats available at the other campuses.You could try to improve your entrance exam result and apply again with a better profile.Looking into related PG Diploma or certificate courses is a good alternative.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted for MBA admission at SRM School of Management?
faqs.answer: CAT, MAT, TANCET, XAT, NMAT and GMAT are accepted as entrance tests for admission to the MBA programme at SRM School of Management.People applying must obtain a high enough score in at least one of these exams.If you are offered admission, the next part is counselling and, possibly, an interview.It is also very important to graduate at or above the 50% mark.

faqs.question: What are the specializations offered under MBA at SRM School of Management?
faqs.answer: Students at SRM School of Management can focus on Marketing, Finance, Human Resource Management, Operations and Systems as specializations.Students are free to select subjects that match what they want to achieve and what skill they are already good at.You begin your specialisation in the second year of the programme.They support the development of specific skills and finding new jobs.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BBA at SRM School of Management?
faqs.answer: You need to have pass Class 12 from a recognised board to apply for BBA at SRM School of Management.Any stream of study is acceptable for eligibility.Admission depends only on students' performance in the qualifying exam.No exam is needed to apply for this programme.

faqs.question: What is the duration and structure of the BBA course at SRM School of Management?
faqs.answer: The Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) at SRM School of Management is a full-time programme that takes three years.It has six semesters and includes marketing, finance, HR and entrepreneurship subjects.Projects, case studies and engagement with industry are part of the course.It inspires students to take part in internships.

faqs.question: Is there an entrance exam for admission to BBA at SRM School of Management?
faqs.answer: No, entrance exams are not needed or used at SRM School of Management for admission to the BBA program.Admission is only given according to the candidate's performance in Class 12.It is necessary to use the official SRMIST admission portal.Those chosen to be shortlisted will be told to bring their documents for verification.

hostel_campus.college_name: SRM School of Management Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
SRM  has14 blocks for boys and 7 blocks for girls as hostel. All the hostels have hi speed Wi-Fi connectivity and are provided with solar water have heating systems, mineral water supply, water cooler in each floor, generator power supply and offers multi cuisine dining facility including thai, chinese and continental food. Rooms with single cot ,study table & chair, cupboard & common mirror are available. Most hostels have common washrooms, a few blocks are available with attached bath and AC rooms too. Facilities such as gym, prayer halls, games, sports and cultural activities has been facilitated. All rooms are available in triple sharing basis.3 International hostels with modernized kitchen,library,drinking water, water heater, telephone,power supply, medical care, recreation,stationery shop, laundry point, gym, playground, indoor games, banking facility, a/c dining hall, a/c study hall.International hostel is also available.
For more information kindly visit institute's website.

library.description:
The library comprises a rich collection of books covering various branches of Management, Engineering and Technology, Medical and Health Sciences and Science and Humanities. The library has stocked 140518 volumes of books consisting of 61289 titles. The collection also includes 1550 handbooks & 200 encyclopedias. Back volume is about 4105. 8235 above project thesis. 781 standards which include BIS, ISA & IEEE. Around 5938 books CDs, 2710 journal CDs, 25 encyclopedia on CDs, 20 self learning tutorials, 850 video programs are available in the library.Cumulative database of nearly 2.52 lakh records covering the period from 1990 - 1999 are available. The library building is fully air-conditioned and automated. Photocopy facility is available in the library.
For more information kindly visit institute's website.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis, Hockey Ground

reviews.review_heading: Lovely days at my college.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are actually pretty good if you opt for CSE, as the new building TP 2 is highly advanced. The library is also pretty good, with a nighttime study facility. Hostels are expensive, and the hostel staff is pretty annoying. You have an appointment at 9 o’clock, so beware of that.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college to study in, and we can choose it without any confusion.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure. It includes classrooms, labs, and a library. Hostel is very clean. Food provided is good for consumption. The college is very supportive of sports. They gives extra care to sports activities..

reviews.review_heading: A pleasant experience at SRM, an overall wonderful journey.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good with many facilities: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Everything is organized in a well-structured manner. There are extracurricular activities, and medical emergency facilities are also available. The campus has a sports arena as well.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best place for pursuing the engineering course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the SRM Institute of Science and Technology is very good; almost all the classrooms on the campus are air conditioned and the facility of a library is available here, although the food in the canteen is not as good as expected .

reviews.review_heading: My college life in a nutshell :).
reviews.review_text: There's Wi-Fi always, the labs are well-equipped too, and the and the classrooms are okayish. I live in a PG, but according to my friend, the food in the hostel is the best, they have a wide range of varieties every day, and there's a huge scope for sports since they conduct many events.

reviews.review_heading: The most blissful college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the class is awesome and worth the fee you are paying. There are air conditioned classrooms having smart boards. Wi-Fi facilities are available for the students both in the college campus and the hostel. The food in the hostel is good and too many items are included in the menu. There are gym facilities in every hostel with many stores are available at every nook and corner so the student don't face any inconvenience. Free medical check up is available for SRMIST students. ...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college because of qualified faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure is really good and the quality of the facilities is also really nice in the college. There is a 24/7 Wi-Fi facility available. Fintech Lab is fully equipped with resources for financial services students. University Building’s library is a really great place to study and read newspapers.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and infrastructure with well reputed faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a good infrastructure. The classrooms are smart with free Wi-Fi and  air conditioners. They provide us with computer labs and fintech labs which are always open for the students. We also have a library which is open for the students for their research and studying.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is good accommodation and good quality food available in the hostel and the mess of the college. We have smart classrooms with free Wi-Fi and air conditioning. We have access to fintech labs. There is a library which is open for the students to do their researches.

reviews.review_heading: Best Campus Life in Chennai.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and AC classrooms are provided here. Our department has a separate library, and medical facilities are available on the campus. Hostel facilities are great, and there is a diversity of food options available due to people coming from various cultural backgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college life.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good, and the college building is nicely built. The design is simple but attractive, and the college is strict in that no helmet entry is prohibited. Wi-Fi is available, but the speed is low, and sometimes connection issues arise. I do not recommend hostel food because the quality is poor. In college restaurants, good food is served. Once a year, they remember that we need to focus on sports; otherwise, no sports activities are conducted by the college.

reviews.review_heading: My college faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college and our courses include free Wi-Fi, well-equipped laboratories, clean water and well-maintained restrooms. The hostel provides high-speed Wi-Fi available at my college and air-conditioned bus services for students.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for management.
reviews.review_text: SRM College of Management has good infrastructure, hostels are well managed and mess food is good and edible. Wi-Fi connections are good in classrooms and labs but not in the entire college. The canteen offers various food items that are good and at an affordable price.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SRM School of Management, SRMIST - SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Chennai.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. The library is equipped with air-conditioners. It has many books. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners. Wi-Fi facility is available in our college and hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. The central library is available in our college. The library is spacious and good. Our HOD is very responsible. Our college has a sports quota. Our college has a medical college and hospital.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a developing college.

faqs.answer: Courses offered by Central India College of Pharmacy are B.Pharma, D.Pharma. These courses are in the stream of Medicine & Health Sciences.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses are available at Central India College of Pharmacy for students?

faqs.answer: Central India College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council. The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State. Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible. Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.D.PharmaCandidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: MSMIA is the best Ayurvedic college in Haryana. I am absolutely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: The college provides an internship of one year, 6 months in the college hospital, and 6 months in any civil hospital in big cities. Interns are provided with a stipend of Rs. 10,000 per month for the whole year. Students are recruited as Ayurvedic medical officers in civil hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides all the essential facilities of labs, classrooms, and the library to students. All the curriculum books are available in the library and students can issue them anytime they want to. The hostel provides 4 shared rooms, and the food is quite healthy. For medical facilities, the college has its own hospital and PG is also here. Sports like football, volleyball, and badminton are played in the sports complex of the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: MSM Institute of Ayurveda.

content.Placements: This is a decent medical course which offers vast career opportunities. Like you can start your own clinic, go into the research field, do jobs, run your own business, do post-graduation, etc. Top companies like Himalaya Drug Company, Patanjali, Aimil, etc., and even the Ministry of AYUSH.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and facilities provided are just okay. Classrooms are fully smart. The library contains all books required. The hostel building is also just okay. For sports-loving students, a sports complex is there, and tournaments are also conducted.

individual_reviews.title: I was absolutely satisfied with teaching staff and administration.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placements. Placements were dependent on students' talents and knowledge. The average salary offered was Rs.60000 per month and the minimum salary offered was Rs.40000 per month after the completion of BAMS. If you go for your setup, it's up to your business behavior and how much you earn. The highest salary package offered depends on your skills and personality. The top recruiter was Himalayan. The top role offered was Ayurvedacharya.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was not available in our college. Labs were not well-equipped and classrooms were also not well maintained. The library had hundreds of books related to Ayurveda. In the hostel, there were no facilities available. There was no power backup. It was a rural area full of compromises.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Maritime Management - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, placements are amazing in 2018. Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 6 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 4.5 LPA. Recruiting companies are Amazon, Sharekhan, HDFC Bank, Bandhan Bank, and Polycab. 70 percent of students got internships at Sharekhan, HDFC Bank, Bandhan Bank, Polycab, HNG, and Axis Bank. Roles offered are manager, assistant manager, production manager, superior, credit manager, and relationship manager.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, and sports ground are available. The college hostel is so good, and the mess is superb. All the sports and games grounds are also very good. The gym is also there. Tournaments in college classes and cricket tournaments are also held for college.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Maritime Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: All new Management students need to take admission in BK College.

content.Placements: More than 85% of students were placed in my course. The lowest salary package is 35,000, and the highest is 55,000. TATA, Birla, ICICI, Kotak Mahindra - these are the top companies. 65% or more students got internships from my college. Managers, BDE, General Manager - these are the positions.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are so good at our premises! The college does have Wi-Fi facilities, labs, and a library. Also, classrooms are well maintained. There are all facilities for students through which all can achieve their goals. There are no hostel facilities, but a canteen is available on the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in General Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best college for Master of Business Administration.

content.Placements: The placement of the college is fantastic. Approximately 90% of the students get placed from the campus itself. The highest package was around 14 Lacs per annum and the average package was around 7 Lacs per annum. Roles offered were of management trainee and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very poor. The main building of the college is too weak. There are not many facilities in this college. The quality of food is average. The college has a small library which has approximately 1000 plus books available. There is a small canteen as well.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in General Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Amazing college for the Masters of Business Administration.

content.Placements: Placement of the college is awesome. Like almost 90% of the students get placed. The highest package was around 14.5 LPA, and the average package was 6 LPA. Top recruiters are mostly Torrent, Adani, HDFC, ICIC, etc. The role was regarding Marketing and finance domain mostly.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very poor. The main building is not as good. The college has a small library. The quality of the food is good, and the hostel facility is also good. Sports and games are also organized during the academic year, and the medical facility is also good.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated MBA in Finance - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a perfectly balanced place to study which is highly recognized with high brand value.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 18 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Almost all gets jobs and internships. It offers studies in finance, HR, defence, business management, business economics management, event management are studied in this college. Management is also good in this college.
content.Infrastructure: Every facility is provided in this college. The hostels are good, and the teachers are good. It provides 4 washrooms on each floor and has smart boards in every class. It provides 4 air-conditioners in each class and is regularly clean. It also has comfortable seats, and provides mics and speakers with CCTV.
