reviews.review_text: Campus life is up to the mark. There are also many extracurricular activities held on the campus. The library is very good and well maintained and has the best books and study material. The classrooms are very good and very spacious. The college is situated on the Gujarat University campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B. K. School of Business Management.
reviews.review_text: There are many hostels and PGs around the college area with the best facilities and good infrastructure. College classrooms are well maintained and well oriented with all the necessary facilities like Wi-Fi, computer room, well-maintained library, and parking space.

reviews.review_heading: If you don't want to spend Lacs of rupees to do MBA, BK is for you. The best thing about BK is ROI.
reviews.review_text: Being a government college BK doesn't have so good infrastructure and it's not too big also. Facilities are enough which are provided by Gujarat University. Some classrooms are the worst while some are unimaginably good. It doesn't have a canteen, you can use GU canteen to have food. Hostel rooms being government are not so clean but are definitely big. Overall you will not face any kind of issues in infrastructure but there is also no room for praise. Being a government college BK conducts so l...

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good opportunities along with good ROI.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. Don't expect much from the college as the infrastructure does not play an important role in students' careers. The aura of the campus and knowledge provided are very important. So just don't think about the outer beauty of the campus, rather think about the education that the college provides. As it is a government college, don't expect much from it in terms of infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Review of BK School of Business Management.
reviews.review_text: We have optimum infrastructure facility available, we have smart class in our college, there is Air Conditioners in our common classroom. We have library in our college. As it is government college we don't have that much good facility in infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: BK School of Business Management is meant for its brand.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is okay. It's not something we expect from a CEPT University. But we just got a report that Gujarat University is constructing a new building for BK SBM, and hope it will be better than the old one.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the course . Good placementS at less investment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good, as it is a government college. There are 3 Full-time and three part-time MBA classrooms, one library and one seminar Hall, but no computer lab.

reviews.review_heading: A review on the B.K School of Business Management.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is old, but they provide air-conditioned classrooms, projectors and all facilities. Gujarat University's area is wide. It is one of the old buildings on the campus. 
The large parking space is there. Near the building, there is one small garden.

reviews.review_heading: There are good marketing placements in this college.

review_summary.college_name: St. Pauls College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best college and top-most pharmacy college in Hyderabad. Best facilities and teachers are friendly.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities for Pharma.D students are steadily growing. The college has strong ties with hospitals, pharmaceutical companies, clinical research organisations, and healthcare startups. Students have been placed in roles such as clinical pharmacists, medical writers, pharmacovigilance associates, clinical research coordinators, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for Pharma.D program at St Pauls College of Pharmacy is excellent. This campus provides state-of-the-art laboratories equipped with modern infrastructure for pharmacy labs. Classrooms are spacious well ventilated and integrated with smart learning tools. The library is rich with updated pharmacy textbooks and journals and access to online databases essential for clinical research. The hospital tie-ups (KIMS Hospital) for clinical training offer real-time patient care experience.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty teaching. Good in lab work. Good in project works. Sports, games, events.

content.Placements: I got an overall percentage in B Pharmacy of 7.15%. I want to get a job with a package of 24000. I am working in Zuventus company. I got an internship in with 80%. I got a job as a Medical representative. I passed with a good percentage. My batchmates are very active and friendly. I miss those persons.
content.Infrastructure: In my college days, I stayed in a hostel. In that hostel, it was very clean and neat. Food is very good. Facilities are very good. Maintenance is clean and neat. Wi-Fi facility is also available. The rent was 4500. In that course, I learned new things. And I learned how to operate lab equipment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Completely satisfied by college's infrastructure and the faculty is supportive and experienced.

content.Placements: 70% of the students were placed. 2-3 LPA was the average CTC offered. Our batch is not provided with any campus placements so, I don't have any ideas about the companies. The college will provide internship and industrial training and also industrial visits. The college will also conduct an international conference every year make us to participate.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are good, and all the equipment is provided by the college. No hostel facility but the classrooms are neat and clean. The library is provided by the college with many books. The computer lab and mentor class will be there in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is really good, and the labs run excellently.

content.Placements: Few of the students were placed in our college only, and some companies like Reddy Labs and the top most companies come for the placements. A few days ago, four of the students were selected by a company; before that, a company also came for the interview and selected a few of the students.
content.Infrastructure: There is no specific college HSL for it; the college infrastructure is good, and labs go very well. The library is available, and they provide all types of books to students. The canteen is not so good, but it's okay; we can adjust, and every Saturday from 1-4 p.m. sports are allowed to be played.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Excellent college for Pharma aspirants .

content.Placements: Many of the students will get a job in Camus placements. The faculty supports every student and encourage them to give an interview. Many tips most companies will offer a job in our college. Jobs in QA (quality assurance), QC (quality control), and production departments are.
content.Infrastructure: Clean labs with all the equipment and chemicals.Spacious classrooms with good ventilation. Canteen with tasty and hygienic food. Experienced faculty. Playground Encouraging students to participate in extracurricular activities during club activities held on Saturdays.

paragraphs: St. Pauls College of Pharmacy admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in GPAT, TS EAMCET, and TS PGECET, etc. for admission. reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. They conduct labs regularly, and Wi-Fi is available on campus. CCTV surveillance is available on campus. A sports week is also conducted this year. There is a doctor available on campus. The canteen food is good.

reviews.review_heading: St. Paul's College of Pharmacy offers solid academics and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure provided for our course included well-equipped labs, digital classrooms, and a library with a good collection of books. The quality of food provided in our hostel and canteen was fresh, good, and hygienic. The medical facilities were also available on campus. In addition, sports like basketball, cricket, and football were often played.

reviews.review_heading: In ongoing field our college is with great faculty, research opportunities, good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The labs are with well-equipped machinery and the digital library provides extensive research material. The quality of canteen is not so amazing but it is reliable. And everyday after college hours and on Saturday we play engage ourselves in various kinds of games.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best pharmacy college in Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-ventilated and equipped with comfortable seating and audio-visual aids such as projectors. It has a pharmaceutics lab, a pharmaceutical chemistry lab, an analysis lab, a pharmacology lab, a pharmacognosy lab, a microbiology lab, a biochemistry lab, a computer lab, and a machine room. It also has a library and a seminar hall for easy, and analysis of projects.

reviews.review_heading: I would suggest it is a good college in Hyderabad to take admission.
reviews.review_text: We have all facilities in college like Wi-Fi, labs, library, classrooms, and canteen, and the quality-wise, it is perfect. It is used to clean every day, wisely to maintain the hygiene and decorum of the college premises. The management behaves well with the parents who come to the college.

reviews.review_heading: Very good environment and best place to study.
reviews.review_text: A central library with a large floor area and access to the internet. Classrooms are big and comfortable to sit in, and the college environment is very good with green areas all around. The hostels are a very good place to stay, and the food provided is also tasty. I suggest people take admission in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment . Best faculity
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was excellent . In hostel there will no shortage of food. There will only use mineral water only for cooking . The hostel food healthy . There will be water 24 hrs for bath,drink etc . The infrastucture in college and hostel good .

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for pharmacy students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided satisfactory facilities and infrastructure for our course. The infrastructure of labs, classrooms, and a library is satisfactory. The quality of facilities in the canteen, medical, sports, and games was good. There was no hostel in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college that provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college is in a large area in this village. It has a free Wi-Fi facility, clean labs, big classrooms, a library with huge books, a playground, and all indoor and outdoor games. Hostel is not available in our college. Students stay in private hostels. Canteen is good and serves tasty food.

reviews.review_heading: If you can pay the fee, this is one of the best medical colleges in Gujarat.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very good with very good facilities. The campus is very neat and clean. We have big classrooms, with very good quality speakers, projectors and benches. We have a good hostel with good rooms and clean washrooms. Cleaning is done every day.

reviews.review_heading: If you can pay 8 lac per year, then it is one of the best colleges in Gujarat.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good infrastructure, placement and education.
reviews.review_text: In hostel, there are two types of room; AC and non AC. There are facilities of Wi-Fi, power generator, there is also very good lift facility. There is a attached mess. Mess food is also good. There is a common TV room and playing room in hostel separately.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities and infrastructure given by Zydus medical College are great.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities like library hostel gym, game zone, garden walking area central AC classrooms etc. For lunch and dinner mess facility is also available as well as cafe. Hostel rooms are with Wi-Fi and washrooms. There are 2 to 3 students for rooms.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty members, and placements, practice and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, there are air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms, Wi-Fi facilities and generator facilities. Mess facilities, canteen facilities, water facilities are also available, and lift facilities are very good. There is a common room for playing, and a TV room and reading rooms are also available here.

reviews.review_heading: Zydus has its own hospital which helps us in our clinical practice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms (central AC) and a library are available. The hostel has 3-sharing rooms, and the mess food is not much good. Medical facilities are admirable. Sports are not good (only a badminton court is available).

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the educational part but the management of college is a bit harsh on students.
reviews.review_text: Our college building has multiple advanced lecture halls. It is one of the best hostel infrastructures among all medical colleges in Gujarat.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has nice faculty and atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Hostel life teaches us about many things like helping others, teamwork, unity, adjustment, caring about others, and sharing things. During hostel life, a student learns about a lot of good things. Hostel life is a bad thing because some students are vulnerable to bad influences.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good, and students can take admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: Around 60 students are placed in our course. The average salary package offered ranges from 1.9 LPA to 2.5 PA. All students in our college who pass the exam get internships in our medical hospital or also rural hospitals and government hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, Wi-Fi connectivity is very good. The classroom is good and clean. The environment of the classroom is education friendly. Library also contains a lot of books in the Ayurvedic facility. The hostel is good, and the hostel and mess are average. The canteen is also good but the food is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The best college I met with really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students are placed. The highest package is Rs. 70,000, the lowest is Rs. 10,000, and the average is Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 1,00,000. The recruiting hospitals are Apollo Hospital and Rubi Hospital. 100% of students have passed in the batch. hostel_campus.college_name: Yogita Dental College and Hospital Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good but infrastructure needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is extremely small, and it has a canteen, two gardens, and one playground. The infrastructure needs some changes. The hostel facility is quite good for girls, whereas the boys hostel needs some serious work to be done. The canteen food is good and hygienic. The extracurricular activities provided by the college are very limited.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college.
reviews.review_text:
The library is good. The hostel is also nice with no complaints.
This college has a good infrastructure with facilities all over the campus. Food and hygiene are also maintained regularly.
The hostel and ground are also maintained.
This college has open space and a clean area. This college is very good with good infrastructure and with good facilities.
The canteen has good food. Cleanliness is maintained and the campus is also clean.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for nature lovers.
reviews.review_text: College has much wide campus with a garden, one cricket playground, and a small parking space. There are all types of landmarks like rivers, trees, and forests nearby a very pleasant environment and a good tourist attraction.

reviews.review_heading: The best college to gain practical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: I am living here for two years, and this college provides more than 80 qualified doctors to teach dentistry. Students are satisfied with studying in this college. The college also provides almost all the facilities, including library, hostel, canteen etc.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is well qualified. The infrastructure and hostel need some development.
reviews.review_text: The college is well-equipped with technical equipment and the infrastructure is quite good. On the other hand hostel buildings are still under development although they are building new ones the space seems to be a little topic of discussion personally.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of sport support and bad sport ground ,educated faculties
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my college is good and continuosly developing now...like various departmets like prosthodontics and conservative are under renewing ,for evert classroom there is a separate WiFi and digital board ,In hostel we get bed wardrobe free electricity

reviews.review_heading: According to me, it is my dream college.
reviews.review_text: The college has classrooms for lectures, labs for practicals and postings, and a library. The college also has Wi-Fi facilities. The facilities provided in the hostel are average. The mess food is good, but sometimes, you will feel bored. The college has all the medical facilities and an ambulance.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for studying/practicing dentistry. Good faculty and staff.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are not particularly modern, but they are adequate for their purpose. The campus has a garden and a canteen/cafeteria, which are the sources of lunch and dinner for many students. There is a ground for playing sports like cricket, badminton, volleyball, football, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good education for the students.
reviews.review_text: The college is huge and spacious with a good amount of space that can accommodate at least 100 students in each department. The college has many facilities which include a library, auditorium, and playground. The hostel is a very good place which accommodates 1000 students to stay.
